title: Information on ['Umar's Division of the Conquered Lands
description: Conquered Lands] According to al-Sari-Shu'ayb-Sayf-Muhammad, Talhah, alMuhallab, 'Amr and Said: 'Ammar b. Yasir remained as governor of al-Kufah for a whole year and part of another during the caliphate of 'Umar. 'Umar b. Suragah, at that time governor of al-Bagrah, wrote to 'Umar b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 14
